elements.text: Walk-In Beneficiary Creation Flow — Vendor App
elements.originalText: Walk-In Beneficiary Creation Flow — Vendor App

elements.text:
/walk-in-beneficiaries

• Name, Phone, Age, Gender
• Validates phone uniqueness
  (API + local stores)
• Generates random wallet
• Sets ProcessType.WALK_IN
elements.originalText:

elements.text:
/consent

• Privacy policy display
• Yes / No radio consent
• Merges consent into
  consumerFormData

elements.text:
/charge-beneficiary-info

• Beneficiary summary
• Voucher Status (redeemed?)
• Voucher Usage (checkup/glasses)
• Glasses Type (conditional)

elements.text:
1. Build payload (extras,
   voucherStatus, eyeCheckup,
   walletAddress, type=WALK_IN)
2. Call createWalkInBeneficiary
   → rpProject.walkin.createBulk
3. Success → isSentForSync: true
4. Error → isSentForSync: false

elements.text:
1. Same payload +
   mode: OFFLINE
2. addWalkInBeneficiary
   isSentForSync: false
3. No API call
4. Stored in IndexedDB

• consumerFormData (accumulated
  across Steps 1–3)

• walkInBeneficiaries[]

elements.text:
useSyncWalkInBeneficiaries:
  • Batch syncs pending (isSentForSync=false)
  • Calls rpProject.walkin.createBulk
  • Idempotency key per batch
  • DLQ for failed/duplicates

useGetSyncedWalkInBeneficiaries:
  • Polls server every 10s
  • Updates local statuses
elements.originalText:

elements.text: Phone Validation (Step 1): API check (getBeneficiaryDetailsByPhone) + local walkInBeneficiaries + syncedWalkInBeneficiaries + vendorWalkInBeneficiaries
elements.originalText: Phone Validation (Step 1): API check (getBeneficiaryDetailsByPhone) + local walkInBeneficiaries + syncedWalkInBeneficiaries + vendorWalkInBeneficiaries

elements.text: Key Types: ProcessType.WALK_IN | BeneficiaryType.WALK_IN | WalkInBeneficiaryStatus (PENDING/IN_PROGRESS/FAILED) | WalkInBeneficiaryMode (ONLINE/OFFLINE)
elements.originalText: Key Types: ProcessType.WALK_IN | BeneficiaryType.WALK_IN | WalkInBeneficiaryStatus (PENDING/IN_PROGRESS/FAILED) | WalkInBeneficiaryMode (ONLINE/OFFLINE)

elements.text:
⚠ Stale detection: PROCESSING rows older
than 5 min are reset to PENDING
(handles worker crashes mid-processing)
elements.originalText:
⚠ Stale detection: PROCESSING rows older
than 5 min are reset to PENDING
(handles worker crashes mid-processing)

elements.text:
Phase 1: Backend (no client changes)

• Prisma migration (WalkinStaging model)
• syncToStaging() service + controller
• StagingWorker cron (staging.worker.ts)
• Register worker in NestJS module
elements.originalText:
Phase 1: Backend (no client changes)

• Prisma migration (WalkinStaging model)
• syncToStaging() service + controller
• StagingWorker cron (staging.worker.ts)
• Register worker in NestJS module

elements.text:
Phase 2: Client (swap endpoint)

• Add syncStaging to vendor SDK
• Update useSyncWalkInBeneficiaries
• Response: 'staged' instead of 'queued'
• Full offline → online → sync test
elements.originalText:
Phase 2: Client (swap endpoint)

• Add syncStaging to vendor SDK
• Update useSyncWalkInBeneficiaries
• Response: 'staged' instead of 'queued'
• Full offline → online → sync test

elements.text:
Phase 3: Cleanup (optional)

• Remove direct createBulk for offline sync
• Add admin UI for staging rows
• Add monitoring alerts for FAILED rows
• Cleanup cron: delete COMPLETED > 30 days
elements.originalText:
Phase 3: Cleanup (optional)

• Remove direct createBulk for offline sync
• Add admin UI for staging rows
• Add monitoring alerts for FAILED rows
• Cleanup cron: delete COMPLETED > 30 days

elements.text:
Concurrency & Safety

• FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
  (atomic row claiming)
• Multiple workers won't process
  same row simultaneously
• Idempotency via unique constraint
  on idempotencyKey column
• Stale detection: PROCESSING > 5min
  reset to PENDING on next poll
• Existing pipeline dedup still runs
  (phone + wallet checks)
elements.originalText:
Concurrency & Safety

• FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
  (atomic row claiming)
• Multiple workers won't process
  same row simultaneously
• Idempotency via unique constraint
  on idempotencyKey column
• Stale detection: PROCESSING > 5min
  reset to PENDING on next poll
• Existing pipeline dedup still runs
  (phone + wallet checks)

elements.text:
Environment Variables

STAGING_POLL_INTERVAL_MS
  Default: 30000 (30s)
  How often worker polls PENDING rows

STAGING_BATCH_SIZE
  Default: 5
  Max rows per poll cycle

STAGING_MAX_RETRIES
  Default: 3
  Attempts before marking FAILED
elements.originalText:

elements.text:
tbl_walkin_staging Schema

  id            Int           @id @autoincrement
  uuid          String        @unique @db.Uuid
  vendorId      String        @db.Uuid → Vendor
  tokenAddress  String
  idempotencyKey String       @unique
  beneficiaries Json          (array payload)
  status        WalkinStagingStatus  @default(PENDING)
  errorMessage  String?
  retryCount    Int           @default(0)
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now())
  processedAt   DateTime?
  completedAt   DateTime?

  @@index([status, createdAt])
  @@map("tbl_walkin_staging")

  processedAt   DateTime?
  completedAt   DateTime?

  @@index([status, createdAt])
  @@map("tbl_walkin_staging")
